notes: Model switch mid-session for mistral-vibe: two no-op turns ('Reply with exactly the word: ok') separated by a /model switch. The /model command opens an arrow-key ModelPickerApp; selecting model B calls VibeConfig.save_updates({'active_model': B}) + _reload_config(), and the next turn's save_interaction dumps config into meta.json, so meta.json.config.active_model = model B. The daemon's readSidecar re-reads meta.json on mtime+size change (sidecar.go) and applySidecar stamps ev.ModelName every event (parser.go); MergeMetrics latest-non-unknown-wins promotes SessionMetrics.ModelName to model B by t2_end. Model A = mistral-medium-3.5 (confirmed live launch default). observations.model LEFT PROVISIONAL — final ModelName = model B is picker-selection-dependent (expected devstral-small on one Down, but list order unconfirmed); record fills it from the recording. tokens_nonzero=true (sidecar context_tokens -> turn_done TokenSnapshot.Total, a window snapshot not a cumulative accumulator), cost_nonzero=false (no cost field; mistral-vibe absent from core/pkg/capacity). The /model picker keystrokes are NOT persisted to messages.jsonl, so no state fires during the switch window (no working/waiting flicker) — structural, not an isLocalCommandContent filter. Single-birth adapter (session id = the session_<...> transcript directory, sessionIDFromPath): birth anchored to start UNPINNED so a transient proc-<PID> presession can't steal it; every turn phase pins same_session_as session_birth. driver=gap:keys — the arrow-key picker needs keys (not_implemented in the scaffolded driver) plus wait_turn (dispatches but omitted from DRIVE_ELICITS); record ports both before driving.

text: session_<...> session born in ready when the transcript directory appears (single-birth; id from the transcript directory, anchored to start unpinned)
Turn 1 user prompt -> working (model A = mistral-medium-3.5 active)
Turn 1 text-only assistant reply (turn_done) -> ready; SessionMetrics.ModelName = mistral-medium-3.5 (from meta.json config.active_model); turn_done carries Tokens.Total>0
The /model picker (slash + arrow-key select) is handled by the TUI dispatcher and never written to messages.jsonl, so no events fire; state stays ready with no working/waiting flicker
Turn 2 user prompt -> working (model B active; meta.json config.active_model rewritten to model B)
Turn 2 completes back to ready; SessionMetrics.ModelName = model B (latest-non-unknown-wins). TotalTokens after T2 >= after T1 (context_tokens snapshot). record fills observations.model = model B.
